author: y4rr
content:
Landed.

## What landed

### New \`Buffer<T>\` type — \`ferrotorch-nn/src/buffer.rs\`
Non-trainable persistent module state. Forces \`requires_grad = false\` (mirrors torch's distinction between Parameter and registered buffer). Same shape as Parameter: derefs to Tensor, Arc-shared identity on clone, with \`zeros\`/\`ones\`/\`from_slice\`/\`set_data\`/\`to(device)\`. 5 unit tests.

### \`Module\` trait extensions — \`ferrotorch-nn/src/module.rs\`
All new methods have default implementations so existing impls compile unchanged.

Buffer iteration:
- \`fn buffers(&self) -> Vec<&Buffer<T>>\` (default empty)
- \`fn buffers_mut(&mut self) -> Vec<&mut Buffer<T>>\` (default empty)
- \`fn named_buffers(&self) -> Vec<(String, &Buffer<T>)>\` (default empty)

Submodule iteration:
- \`fn children(&self) -> Vec<&dyn Module<T>>\` (default empty)
- \`fn named_children(&self) -> Vec<(String, &dyn Module<T>)>\` (default empty)
- \`fn modules(&self) -> Vec<&dyn Module<T>>\` (where Self: Sized — yields self + descendants depth-first)
- \`fn named_modules(&self)\` — same with dot-paths
- \`fn descendants_dyn\` / \`named_descendants_dyn\` — object-safe variants (yield strict descendants only, since dyn-Self can't coerce to \`&dyn Module<T>\`)

Helpers:
- \`fn zero_grad(&self) -> FerrotorchResult<()>\` — calls \`tensor.zero_grad()\` on each parameter
- \`fn requires_grad_(&mut self, bool)\` — toggle requires_grad on every parameter (added \`Parameter::set_requires_grad\` to support freezing)
- \`fn apply_to_parameters(&mut self, &mut dyn FnMut(&mut Parameter<T>))\` — visits every parameter; uses \`&mut dyn FnMut\` (not generic) to keep the trait dyn-compatible

State dict integration:
- \`state_dict\` now emits parameters AND buffers (matches torch). Keys disambiguated by their original names since the call sites are independent.
- \`load_state_dict\` accepts both parameter and buffer keys; strict mode rejects unknown keys against the union.
- \`to_device\` moves both parameters and buffers.

### Tests
- \`ferrotorch-nn module::tests\`: 22 pass (12 new + 10 existing)
- \`ferrotorch-nn buffer::tests\`: 5 pass
- \`ferrotorch-nn hooks::tests\`: 12 pass (existing — verified the trait extension didn't break HookedModule)
- \`cargo test --workspace --no-fail-fast --features cuda\`: zero regressions

## Out of scope → #606
- Promoting \`register_*_hook\` to the \`Module\` trait surface (so any module can register hooks without wrapping in \`HookedModule\`). The hook surface lives on \`HookedModule<M>\` today and works correctly. Moving it to the trait requires either (a) every Module impl owning a HookRegistry, or (b) a derive macro. Documented options in #606.
- Backward hooks: \`HookedModule::register_backward_hook\` stores the closure but never fires it — needs autograd integration to attach to the output tensor's grad_fn. Tracked in #606.
